extraction.one_line_summary: YATES Simon attacked with 6.5km to go on the Alpe Mottarone finish, gaining 30 seconds on BERNAL Egan who was isolated but limited losses.
tactical_patterns: ALMEIDA João attacked in final 500m when BERNAL isolated, reducing time loss—calculated aggression from second-place rider.
INEOS bringing back MARTÍNEZ Daniel Felipe split at 60km showed panic management; GANNA Filippo's domestique work critical pre-climb.
BikeExchange controlled four-minute maximum gap from 70km out, forcing early splits on descent before final climb.
YATES attacked solo at 6.5km remaining, not on steepest gradients—choosing psychological moment over pure gradient maximization.

rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: attacked isolated GC leader on 10% gradient and gained 30 seconds, showing recovered form after earlier struggles
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: neutral: lost 30 seconds when isolated in final 500m but defended maglia rosa; unable to respond when ALMEIDA attacked
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: positive: opportunistically attacked BERNAL when isolated, demonstrating tactical awareness to claw back GC time in finale
rider_signals.CARUSO Damiano: positive: followed YATES initial move, maintaining GC position while others dropped
rider_signals.VLASOV Aleksandr: negative: had to work back to chase group after being distanced, showing vulnerability on steep 10% gradients
rider_signals.CARTHY Hugh: negative: dropped from chase group entirely, losing ground on 10% climb despite earlier form
rider_signals.MARTÍNEZ Daniel Felipe: positive: missed early split but returned to pace BERNAL on final climb, showing diesel recovery capacity
rider_signals.MARTIN Dan: positive: rode into top 10 GC on stage, indicating late-race form improvement
